hero.title: KLET DEVELOPMENT
hero.tagline: I build the product. You build the business.
hero.subtitle: Senior developer. 10 years taking projects from concept to production — design, architecture, code, and delivery.

web.name: Web Development
web.description: Production-grade web apps — fast, accessible, built to scale. From UI design to deployment, I handle the full delivery.

mobile.name: Mobile Development
mobile.description: iOS & Android apps, single codebase. I handle the full lifecycle — development, integration, and store deployment.

consulting.name: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: Architecture reviews, performance audits, and technical roadmaps. I help your team make better engineering decisions.

about.title: [ ABOUT ]
about.story: I'm Kameron — senior developer, building production-grade applications since 2016. I take care of the full scope: from specifications and design to development and maintenance.
about.approach: Need someone to integrate into your team? I adapt fast. Need to build a product from scratch? I handle everything from Figma to deployment. No unnecessary process, just delivery. Based in France, working with teams across Europe.
about.tech: React · TypeScript · Node.js · React Native · PostgreSQL · AWS

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.content: This website does not use cookies. Anonymous usage analytics are collected via Vercel Analytics to improve the user experience. No personal data is collected, stored, or shared with third parties.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
